title: Bank Trade System Enhancements
lead: Assigned for various Bank Trade System Projects like I/E LC’s, LG’s, Payment & Settlement, Data cleansing, Imaging Data base Development & enhancement Project.
overview: Assisting in all Trade enhancements Projects + Reviewing BRD & Test Cases for UAT. This involved deep coordination to ensure financial system updates met rigorous operational standards.
challenge: Processing Letter of Credits, Letter of Guarantees, Collection, Settlement, Payment Vouchers, and Loan agreements in the Bank System while working under full pressure.
solution: Preparing Policy & Procedures for All Trade Products in MS Visio & Project. Assisting Kingdom wide staff for all new System enhancement by visiting or online.

title: Automated Loan Agreement Generator
lead: Developed & maintaining a dynamic loan agreement generator built completely in MS-Access/VBA.
overview: Designed a custom application to automate the drafting of complex corporate banking loan agreements, significantly reducing manual documentation time.
challenge: Managing and processing high volumes of Loan agreements in the Bank System while working under full pressure required a more robust solution than manual entry.
solution: Leveraged advanced programming skills, effectively maintaining all transactions records in VBA base Excel formats created by me.

title: Automated Trade Finance Records Management
lead: Developed & maintaining a dynamic Letter of Credit registration generator built completely in MS-Excel/VBA.
overview: Designed a custom application to automate the drafting of complex corporate banking Trade Finance records, significantly reducing manual documentation time.
challenge: Managing and processing high volumes of LC records in the Bank System while working under full pressure required a more robust solution than manual entry.
solution: One click generate approval forms for AML, Compliance and Operations. This application is used by all Trade Finance staff in Ziraat Bank for all LC records management.
